{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Zerachiel
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Zerachiel]] is a [[Judge]] known as the [[Fox]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Fox]]'s name is [[Zerachiel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Don’t call me that! Call me Zerachiel!”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
